name: stratiq
description: StratIQ - Enterprise Business Intelligence & Decision Intelligence Platform

scripts.dev:api: npm run build -w @stratiq/shared && npm run dev -w @stratiq/api
scripts.dev:web: npm run build -w @stratiq/shared && npm run dev -w @stratiq/web
scripts.dev:worker: npm run build -w @stratiq/shared && npm run worker:dev -w @stratiq/api
scripts.build: npm run build -w @stratiq/shared && npm run build -w @stratiq/api && npm run build -w @stratiq/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @stratiq/shared && npm run typecheck -w @stratiq/api && npm run typecheck -w @stratiq/web
